sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47014" key="h(merotrofi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμεροτροφίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n47014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feeding for the day</tr_>:= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χοῖνιξ</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1407.tlg002:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclid.Lemb.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
